caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is positioned in a recording studio against a background of black acoustic foam panels. He is wearing a white t-shirt and black over-ear headphones. A professional condenser microphone, mounted on a boom arm, is positioned directly in front of his face. The arm of the microphone features the text "Rode NT1-A". The man has tattoos on his right arm, which is partially visible. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth opening and closing as he articulates words. His expression remains focused and intense, and he maintains a consistent position relative to the microphone and the background throughout the clip.
